name: HMS HDML 1075 (ML 1075)
events: 18 Jul 1945 HMS Truant (Lt.Cdr. R.S. Brookes, DSO, DSC, RN) conducted night snort trials off Leith during which she was escorted by HMS HDML 1075 (T/A/Ch.Skr. P. Reid, RNR). (1)
19 Jul 1945 HMS Truant (Lt.Cdr. R.S. Brookes, DSO, DSC, RN) conducted night snort trials off Leith during which she was escorted by HMS HDML 1075 (T/A/Ch.Skr. P. Reid, RNR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
